allow: Bash(powershell -Command "5001,5050,5100,5200,8000,8080,8888 | ForEach-Object { $port = $_ $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $conn.Connect\(''127.0.0.1'', $port\); ""$port IN USE"" } catch { ""$port FREE"" } finally { $conn.Dispose\(\) } }")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vulns=d.get\('vulnerabilities',{}\); [print\(k, v['severity'], v.get\('fixAvailable'\)\) for k,v in vulns.items\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const p=l.packages; ['@xmldom/xmldom','postcss','esbuild','vite'].forEach\(n => { const k=Object.keys\(p\).find\(k=>k.endsWith\('/'+n\) && !k.includes\('node_modules/node_modules'\)\); if\(k\) console.log\(n, p[k].version\); }\);")
